hero.description: خطط لرحلة أحلامك مع توصيات محلية موثوقة، وملاحة آمنة، وتنبيهات الاحتيال، والمساعدة في النقل - كل ذلك في تجربة متميزة واحدة.
faq.title: الأسئلة الشائعة الأكثر تكراراً
faq.subtitle: نحن هنا لمساعدتكم وحل شكوككم. اعثروا على إجابات للأسئلة الأكثر شيوعاً أدناه.
faq.a1: This platform helps tourists visiting the Fes-Meknes region plan and manage their trip from arrival to return. It combines itinerary planning, medina navigation, trusted recommendations, bookings, transport guidance, safety tips, and social activities in one place.
faq.q2: Who is this platform designed for?
faq.a2: It is designed mainly for international tourists visiting Fes-Meknes, especially first-time visitors who need reliable planning, navigation, and local guidance.
faq.q3: Why use this platform instead of several separate apps?
faq.a3: Instead of switching between maps, booking sites, recommendation lists, and messaging apps, you can organize your trip in one interface with personalized suggestions and practical support for the medina.
faq.q4: Why is Fes special for travelers?
faq.a4: Fes is one of Morocco's most historic destinations. The medina is UNESCO-listed and is widely known for its preserved urban fabric, traditional crafts, and dense pedestrian alleys.
faq.q5: What can I discover in the Fes medina?
faq.a5: You can explore historic gates, artisan workshops, traditional markets, riads, religious and architectural landmarks, local food spots, and cultural experiences tied to crafts such as leatherwork, weaving, pottery, and metalwork.
faq.q6: Is the medina large and easy to get around?
faq.a6: The medina is fascinating but complex. It is famous for its interlacing alleys and dense pedestrian layout, so many visitors find navigation difficult without a reliable route or local help.
faq.q7: Can the platform create a personalized itinerary?
faq.a7: Yes. You can enter your trip length, interests, budget, pace, and travel style, and the platform generates a tailored itinerary for your stay.
faq.q8: What preferences can I use to personalize my trip?
faq.a8: Typical preferences include culture, gastronomy, artisan shopping, photography, family-friendly activities, relaxed pace, social outings, budget level, and mobility needs.
faq.q9: Can I plan my trip before arriving in Morocco?
faq.a9: Yes. You can prepare your stay in advance, save places, compare options, and build a first itinerary before arrival.
faq.q10: Can I update my itinerary during the trip?
faq.a10: Yes. You can adjust your itinerary as your plans change, replace activities, reorder your day, and react to weather, fatigue, or new discoveries.
faq.q11: Can the platform suggest a short stay plan for 1 or 2 days?
faq.a11: Yes. It can generate compact itineraries focused on the most relevant attractions, food stops, and practical routes for shorter stays.
faq.q12: How can I avoid getting lost in the medina?
faq.a12: Use the platform's guided navigation, save your destination before leaving your riad, and follow verified routes instead of relying on unsolicited street help.
faq.q13: Does the platform support offline navigation?
faq.a13: The goal is to offer offline-friendly navigation features so visitors can keep following essential routes even with weak mobile data in the medina.
faq.q14: Can I save my hotel or riad location?
faq.a14: Yes. You should save your accommodation, meeting points, and key landmarks so you can return more easily during the day.
faq.q15: Does the platform highlight landmarks and trusted meeting points?
faq.a15: Yes. It can point you to practical landmarks, verified venues, and safer meeting points to make orientation easier.
faq.q16: What should I do when I arrive at Fes-Saiss Airport?
faq.a16: After landing, confirm your destination, internet access, transport option, and accommodation instructions. The platform can guide you through arrival, transfer choices, and your first steps in the city.
faq.q17: Are there useful services at Fes-Saiss Airport?
faq.a17: Yes. Official airport information lists taxis, car rental, cafés and restaurants, information points, internet, exchange/post, phone services, parking, and medical assistance among the available services.
faq.q18: Can I take a train directly from Fes-Saiss Airport?
faq.a18: No direct train serves the airport. Travelers usually continue by road to the city first, then use the rail network from Fes station if needed.
faq.q19: Can the platform help me leave the airport safely?
faq.a19: Yes. It can help you choose a transfer option, estimate the route, and reduce confusion during your arrival.
faq.q20: Can the platform help me compare transport options?
faq.a20: Yes. It can help you compare walking, taxi, private transfer, and intercity travel options depending on your route and schedule.
faq.q21: Can the platform estimate local transport prices?
faq.a21: Yes. One of the main goals is to reduce overcharging risk by showing expected transport ranges or guidance before you book or board.
faq.q22: How can I reduce the risk of taxi overcharging?
faq.a22: Check the expected price in the platform before the ride, confirm the destination clearly, and prefer verified or pre-arranged transport when possible.
faq.q23: Can I book or prepare intercity train travel from Fes?
faq.a23: Yes. Morocco's ONCF rail network allows online schedule and ticket lookup, and the platform can direct travelers who plan to continue to cities such as Meknes, Rabat, Casablanca, Tangier, or Marrakech.
faq.q24: How can I avoid fake guides in the medina?
faq.a24: Be careful with unsolicited offers from strangers claiming a street is closed or insisting on guiding you. Prefer guides, activities, and providers that are recommended by your accommodation or verified inside the platform.
faq.q25: What should I do if someone insists on helping me?
faq.a25: Stay calm, decline clearly, and continue toward a verified destination or contact point. If needed, use the platform to reorient yourself instead of accepting pressure-based help.
faq.q26: Can the platform warn me about common scam patterns?
faq.a26: Yes. The idea is to provide practical alerts about common tourist issues such as false directions, overcharging, pressure selling, and unreliable offers.
faq.q27: How can I shop more confidently in Fes?
faq.a27: Prefer places with verified reputation, compare options, take your time, and avoid feeling rushed into a purchase. The platform can highlight more trusted artisan or food options.
faq.q28: Can the platform show safer routes or areas of caution?
faq.a28: That is one of the intended benefits. The platform can surface route guidance and caution points so travelers make more informed choices.
faq.q29: Can the platform help me find authentic experiences?
faq.a29: Yes. A core goal is to help visitors discover real artisans, trusted food spots, and culturally meaningful activities instead of generic tourist traps.
faq.q30: Can I discover local crafts through the platform?
faq.a30: Yes. Fes is strongly associated with craftsmanship, and the platform can highlight artisan-related experiences, workshops, and trusted places to explore local know-how.
faq.q31: Can the platform recommend trusted food spots?
faq.a31: Yes. It can recommend restaurants, cafés, or food experiences based on your preferences and a verified or curated approach.
faq.q32: Can I book activities through the platform?
faq.a32: Yes. The platform is designed to centralize activity discovery and booking so visitors do not need to switch between many services.
faq.q33: Can the platform help me avoid overly touristy experiences?
faq.a33: Yes. It aims to recommend more authentic and better-matched options based on your interests, instead of generic one-size-fits-all suggestions.
faq.q34: Can I meet other travelers through the platform?
faq.a34: Yes. The concept includes social discovery features so users can join friendly outings, group activities, or shared experiences with other travelers.
faq.q35: Can I join group outings or friendly meetups?
faq.a35: Yes. The platform can support social activities such as shared visits, food outings, or interest-based meetups when available.
faq.q36: Can I choose whether I want social recommendations or not?
faq.a36: Yes. Social discovery should be preference-based, so users can opt in or stay focused on solo or private travel plans.
faq.q37: Does the platform support solo travelers?
faq.a37: Yes. Solo travelers can use personalized routes, safety guidance, trusted recommendations, and optional social features to reduce uncertainty.
faq.q38: Can the platform help women traveling alone?
faq.a38: The project aims to support safer planning with trusted recommendations, route support, and profile-based suggestions adapted to different traveler needs.
faq.a39: Yes. Families can receive calmer itineraries, easier logistics, and activity suggestions matched to children or shared travel needs.
faq.a40: Yes. The platform can adapt suggestions based on pace, comfort, and route complexity.
faq.q41: Can the platform support accessibility needs?
faq.a41: That is part of the product vision. Preferences can include mobility or comfort constraints so recommendations are more realistic for each traveler.
faq.q42: Can the platform help with language barriers?
faq.a42: Yes. The concept includes practical language support so travelers can better understand common phrases, directions, and simple local interactions.
faq.q43: Can I get cultural etiquette tips?
faq.a43: Yes. The platform can provide simple local etiquette guidance to help visitors interact respectfully and confidently.
faq.q44: Will the chatbot answer common travel questions?
faq.a44: Yes. A local FAQ chatbot can answer common questions about planning, navigation, safety, transport, bookings, and platform features.
faq.q45: Can I manage bookings in one place?
faq.a45: Yes. One of the project's advantages is reducing app fragmentation by grouping planning, recommendations, and booking flows together.
faq.q46: Can the platform help me compare experiences before booking?
faq.a46: Yes. You can review options based on interest, trust, price, schedule, and fit with your itinerary.
faq.q47: Can I save activities for later before deciding?
faq.a47: Yes. You can shortlist places and revisit them later while refining your plan.
faq.q48: Why is integrated payment useful for travelers?
faq.a48: Integrated payment reduces friction because travelers do not need to jump across multiple services to complete transport or activity arrangements.
faq.q49: Can the platform make trip organization faster?
faq.a49: Yes. By combining planning, recommendations, booking, and practical assistance, it is designed to reduce the time needed to organize a stay.
faq.q50: What should I do if cannot find an answer in the chatbot?
faq.a50: Use the support or contact option if available, or check verified recommendations and saved trip details inside the platform.
faq.q51: Can I use the platform throughout the whole trip?
faq.a51: Yes. The platform is intended to assist from arrival to return, not only before the trip.
footer.tagline: تبسيط رحلتك عبر المناظر الطبيعية والثقافات المذهلة.
footer.newsletterDesc: احصل على نصائح السفر وأدلة محلية حصرية.
pricing.title: أسعارنا
pricing.subtitle: اختر الخطة التي تناسب أهدافك وحجمك. تتضمن كل خطة أدوات سفر قوية، ووصولاً بدون اتصال بالإنترنت، وجميع الميزات التي تحتاجها دون حدود.
pricing.side2: خرائط بدون اتصال ومساعدة في المسار
pricing.side3: لا توجد رسوم مخفية أو عمولات
pricing.pro.name: خطة المستكشف
pricing.custom.name: كونسيرج بريميوم
features.title: ميزات متميزة صُممت لمواجهة الصعوبات الحقيقية للسياح.
features.desc: هذا ليس مجرد تطبيق خرائط. فهو يجمع بين الذكاء المحلي، وإشارات الثقة، ومنع الاحتيال، وتخصيص تجربة السائح في تجربة متميزة واحدة.
features.f1.title: ملاحة ذكية بدون اتصال بالإنترنت
features.f1.desc: مسارات مشي واضحة، ومعالم بارزة، وتسجيل ثقة للمناطق السياحية المزدحمة والمدن القديمة.
features.f2.title: منع الاحتيال
features.f2.desc: تنبيهات للمرشدين المزيفين، وأنماط المبالغة في الأسعار، ومناطق البيع القسري، والادعاءات المضللة.
features.f3.title: توصيات محلية معتمدة
features.f3.desc: رياضات موثوقة، مطاعم، حرفيون، مقاهي، مواقع ثقافية، ومرشدون رسميون.
features.f4.title: تخطيط شخصي مدعوم بالذكاء الاصطناعي
features.f4.desc: اقتراحات تكييفية بناءً على أسلوب السفر والميزانية واللغة ونوع المجموعة والتفضيلات.
features.f5.title: إرشادات أسعار النقل
features.f5.desc: تقدير الأسعار العادلة لسيارات الأجرة والتحويلات لتقليل عدم اليقين وإساءة معاملة السياح.
features.f6.title: ملفات السلامة
features.f6.desc: أوضاع للنساء اللاتي يسافرن بمفردهن، والعائلات، وكبار السن، والزوار لأول مرة مع نصائح مخصصة.
mvp.title: جرب الفرق.
mvp.desc: تم تصميم Trippple ليكون رفيقك المحلي، مما يضمن أن كل خطوة في مغامرتك بالمغرب آمنة وأصلية وخالية من التوتر.
